name: SAHAKAR MITRA: NCDC’s Scheme on Internship Programme
benefit_description: Financial Support from NCDC: The intern will be offered the following financial benefits during the course of SIP (4 months):- Sl. No. Details Amount 1 Consolidated monthly amount of ₹10,000/- for 4 months towards partly meeting his/her out-of-pocket expenses ₹40,000/- 2 Expenses related to report p
details: The "SAHAKAR MITRA Scheme on Internship Programme (SIP)" was introduced by the National Cooperative Development Corporation (NCDC) in the year 2012-13 with an objective to provide work-related learning experience in the core and special fields of functioning of NCDC to students of professional courses and to project contribution and achievements of NCDC in the development of cooperatives. Subsequently, the scheme was expanded to cover different states by offering SIP to students (in 2nd year of
eligibility_text: 1.	A person with any of the following qualifications will be eligible for consideration:- Professional graduates with minimum qualification as Bachelor’s degree in Agri/ Dairy/ Animal Husbandry/ Veterinary Sciences/ Fisheries/Horticulture/ Textiles/ Handloom / IT duly recommended by the Head of the Department of the UGC / AICTE / ICAR recognized Universities / Institutions as applicable.
